labeled_from: blinded 5-field view (n, item_id, world, raw_query, candidate_a, candidate_b) of rejudge/phase2_checker_reserve_pool_2026-07-18.json; canonical_sha256 verified b17ccd66fca181c23cb72a6e96f1c4f6fe56b57125ae104d9f9c9f63da3f15c2; all human_label/labeler fields verified null before labeling
draw_rule: label_minimums.top_up_rule executed in the reserve pool's frozen order (world_stratified_round_robin); the unresolved minimum (>=20) cannot be met by any prefix of a pool containing no unresolved items, so the entire pool was labeled; unresolved remained 0
contract: docs/oracle-query-contract.md as rendered in the frozen labeling-tool header
conventions:
Claude's blinded labels for the 150-item checker reserve pool (top-up draw).

Labeled 2026-07-21 by Claude (Fable 5) from a blinded 5-field view (n, item_id,
world, raw_query, candidate_a, candidate_b) with all synthetic/boundary/mechanical
metadata stripped, applying the frozen contract and the same consistency
conventions recorded in phase2_checker_claude_labels_2026-07-20.json, plus two
refinements applied uniformly here (recorded for the oracle's audit):

- Causal relation AS the predicate ("X was a direct response to Y", "X is limited
  by Y") = one atomic claim -> allow. Causal/explanatory clause APPENDED to an
  otherwise complete fact ("lost 60% of revenue due to Y", "ceased measurements
  due to concerns about Y", "citing infrastructure costs") = joined facts -> reject.
- Purely temporal markers identifying an event ("withdrew for 8 years after a
  population-count dispute") do not count as a second fact; motive or mechanism
  attributions ("as a response to", "to secure") do.

The draw was executed under the frozen top-up rule (label_minimums.top_up_rule):
replacements drawn in the reserve pool's frozen order. Because the unresolved
minimum can never be met by any prefix of the pool if the pool contains no
unresolved items, the entire pool was labeled; unresolved remained 0.

Dict maps n (1-based frozen-order position) -> (item_id, label, rationale).
The build script asserts item_id and order against the frozen pool file.
status: operative under amendment checker_labeling_adopt_model_labels_2026-07-21 together with rejudge/phase2_checker_claude_labels_2026-07-20.json; subject to Codex post-hoc review before feeding checker-candidate selection
